configurations.name: gmaz-rutas
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const dir='D:/gmaz-rutas';http.createServer((req,res)=>{const fp=path.join(dir,decodeURIComponent(req.url.split('?')[0])==='/'?'gmaz-rutas-v3.html':decodeURIComponent(req.url.split('?')[0]));fs.readFile(fp,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('404');}else{const ext=path.extname(fp);const ct=ext==='.html'?'text/html; charset=utf-8':ext==='.js'?'application/javascript':ext==='.css'?'text/css':'application/octet-stream';res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':ct});res.end(d);}});}).listen(7893,()=>console.log('GMAZ server on 7893'));
